Package io.apicurio.datamodels.util

package io.apicurio.datamodels.util
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.apicurio.datamodels
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CommandUtil
    Utility class for marshalling (Command → JSON) and unmarshalling (JSON → Command) of ICommand instances.
    CommandUtil.ICommandDeserializer
    Custom Jackson deserializer for ICommand fields.
    CommandUtil.NodePathDeserializer
    Custom Jackson deserializer for NodePath fields.
    CommandUtil.NodePathSerializer
    Custom Jackson serializer for NodePath fields.
    LoggerUtil
    Compatibility class used to perform logging.
    ModelTypeUtil
     
    NodeUtil
    A utility class containing methods used to interact with data model nodes.
    RegexUtil
    Compatibility class used to bridge the gap between Java and JavaScript with respect to working with regular expressions.
    ValidationUtil
    A compatibility layer containing methods used when performing validation.
